    Technical source data

    MissionTypes:48DwsQEPW0SugxGBk7QRpw

    labelQuestions about that past: Part 4 (0-0)
    titleQuestions about that past: Part 4
    addedEnemies[]
    completeDescriptionWrengher Jones: “That’s a start at least. Thanks… I suppose. Very well? What do you want to know about Azuron? To be honest I don’t know very much, that battle was… just horrible, I used to be a Captain in the Azuron 3rd Fleet. I’m probably the only survivor from that unit. There was no warning, we had no clue where they came from, who they were or what they wanted. They opened fire before we even had time to try to open a communication channel. After a few seconds it was clear that we didn’t have a chance… we decided to abandon ship.. much good that did, they didn’t care about the intergalactic laws of war.. they used our escape pods... for target practise… I was to only one to survive. I don’t know if I could be called lucky… I drifted for over 2 years before I arrived in hyperion.”
    nextMissionkZQKndcdU0C5-00wLBRN1g

    value10
    minLvl0
    maxLvl0
    descriptionTake out 10 of the closest hostile battle stations and Wrengher Jones promised to tell you what he knows about Azuron.

    subtypespawner
